description: READ-ONLY (G9). The citizen wayfinding query: 'where do I do procedure X (near me)?' Given a procedure query + optional jurisdiction/geo, return matching procedures with their 窓口 + 住所 + 書式, and the toritsugiRef for delivery handoff. Civic wayfinding only — NEVER returns an attack-surface/SPOF ranking of the state (G10). Returns NOTHING actionable for :unverified-seed/:stale rows beyond a 'verify first' flag (G12).

q.description: procedure title / keyword, e.g. 住民票 / income tax return

toritsugiRef.description: handoff to toritsugi for guided delivery

verifyFirst.description: G12 — true when verificationStatus != maintainer-verified; downstream MUST re-verify before acting
